summary: Comprehensive testing of Plan4Growth Academy completed successfully. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 3 portal dashboards (Admin, Rep, Student) with role-based routing working correctly. OTP verification flow is MOCKED but functional. All features from the testing list verified and working.

design_issues.issue: Shows 'Profile not found' for test student - expected since student was created without full profile data

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - existing test users from credentials were used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 portal dashboards verified. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api_endpoints.py. OTP verification returns test OTP in _test_otp field (MOCKED). Stripe, S3, SendGrid, Twilio integrations are MOCKED but architecture is in place. Student profile shows 'Profile not found' because test student user was created but no Student record exists - this is expected behavior for users not registered through rep flow.

mocked_integrations_notes.otp: OTP is MOCKED - returns _test_otp in response for testing
mocked_integrations_notes.stripe: Stripe payments are MOCKED - simulates payment flow
mocked_integrations_notes.s3: AWS S3 document upload is MOCKED - returns mock URLs
mocked_integrations_notes.sendgrid: SendGrid email OTP is MOCKED - logs to console
mocked_integrations_notes.twilio: Twilio WhatsApp OTP is MOCKED - logs to console
